rationale: The citing paper references Erdem and Sun (2002) only in an introductory sentence that lists example application areas, including umbrella branding and advertising. It does not engage that paper's spillover results or dynamic model when building theory, specifying the model, estimating parameters, or interpreting findings. The core development of the citing paper is tied to other multicategory-choice work, so this citation serves as general background rather than a functional input.
